---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new agent, MCP ambassador, tool, or substrate feature.
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Goal

What does the user or operator gain?

## Why this exists

What does the substrate currently lack? Is this feature barred by
the Charter (Article 7 refusal list) or encouraged (Article 1
territory or Article 2 communication)?

## Sketch

If you already have a code sketch, link to a PR or paste a snippet.

## Effort estimate

`simple` / `medium` / `complex` — rough. (See Charter Article 8.1
analogue in the `BaseAgent` system prompt.)

## Open questions

Uncertainties, tradeoffs, migration concerns.
